content.problemStatement:
TanMinati loves solving problems.

You are given an array AAA of size NNN, where AiA_iAi​ represents the number of problems TanMinati solved on the iii-th day.

A "streak" is defined as a sequence of consecutive days where TanMinati solves **at least 111 problem** every day.

Find the length of the **longest streak** present among these NNN days.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN — the size of the array.
The next line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,…,ANA_1, \ldots, A_NA1​,…,AN​, where AiA_iAi​ denotes the number of problems solved by TanMinati on iii-th day.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the length of the longest streak by TanMinati.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: TanMinati codes for only 111 day which is the longest streak.
Test case 222: TanMinati coded on day 111 and rested on day 222 so the longest streak of TanMinati coding is 111 day.
Test case 333: TanMinati coded on both days 222 and 333, so the longest streak of TanMinati coding is 222 days.
